stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft, equipped with 3 LRNS displays the message “GPS POSITION LOST” on the Navigation Display (ND). The aircraft is in the NAT HLA. What does this indicate about the FMC mode?

options.b: The crew shall monitor their position using the IRS
options.c: Due to the GPS failure, the aircraft cannot operate within the NAT HLA
options.d: FMC requires the reinitialization of position data
